covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Indiana Department of Health
covid_surveillance.long_description: Indiana Department of Health collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza surveillance data from Indiana Department of Health
influenza_surveillance.long_description: Indiana Department of Health collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

in_dph.name: Indiana Department of Health
in_dph.description: Indiana Department of Health provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Indiana covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, ili, ari . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
in_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
